scripts.serve: corepack pnpm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions,firestore
scripts.shell: corepack pnpm run build && firebase functions:shell
scripts.deploy: corepack pnpm run build && firebase deploy --only functions,firestore:rules
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run build:test && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore "node --test lib_test/test/ownership/ownership_callable.test.js lib_test/test/account/account_delete_callable.test.js lib_test/test/runs/run_session_callable.test.js lib_test/test/runs/run_callables_auth_gating.test.js lib_test/test/runs/run_submission_callable.test.js lib_test/test/runs/run_projection.test.js lib_test/test/runs/run_cleanup.test.js lib_test/test/leaderboards/leaderboard_callable.test.js lib_test/test/ghosts/ghost_callable.test.js lib_test/test/boards/board_provisioning.test.js"
